description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a minimalist design and a soft, pastel pink color. The sofa features three distinct seat and back cushions, all of which are uniform in size and seamlessly integrated into the overall structure. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a boxy, geometric appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and untextured, with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching. The base of the sofa is solid and fully enclosed, with no visible legs or supports, contributing to its clean and contemporary look. The overall form is low-profile and inviting, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A pastel pink, three-seater sofa with a boxy, minimalist design, featuring uniform seat and back cushions and wide, straight armrests. The upholstery is smooth and untextured, and the base is fully enclosed with no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, wide straight armrests, and the sofa's full width.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the solid, enclosed base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and depth features seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all seamlessly integrated and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight armrests at each end, extending to the height of the backrest with a boxy, geometric profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully enclosed and flush with the ground, giving a solid, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest segmented into three sections, matching the seat cushions with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid pastel pink color with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns or stitching.
